ogTitle: Cadgee vs Caffreys Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cadgee and Caffreys Flat.
heading: Cadgee vs Caffreys Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cadgee, New South Wales and Caffreys Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cadgee has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Caffreys Flat (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cadgee or Caffreys Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cadgee has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Caffreys Flat scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cadgee scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Caffreys Flat scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cadgee or Caffreys Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cadgee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
